currentSkills.communication: Speaks in 5-7 word sentences, good vocabulary, difficulty with conversational turn-taking
currentSkills.social: Parallel play only, does not initiate with peers, difficulty reading social cues
currentSkills.adaptive: Independent with most self-care, needs reminders for hygiene tasks
currentSkills.academic: Reading at grade level, math slightly below, difficulty with group work
currentSkills.behavior: Meltdowns when routines change (2-3 per week at school), rigid thinking

priorityAreas: Participation in group activities at school
